title: schmidtottia neglecta
intro: Schmidtottia neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Schmidtottia neglecta are often used to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
